ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "href" TEXT /* URL path to the product page */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity or size of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer rating for the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Old price of the product (if discounted) */,
  "saving_text" TEXT /* Text describing any savings or discounts */,
  "category_1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary category of the product */,
  "category_2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary category of the product */,
  "category_3_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tertiary category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_2_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_1_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_3_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_3_id") REFERENCES tertiary_categories ("tertiary_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent subcategory */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subcategory is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tertiary_categories" (
  "tertiary_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tertiary category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary category */,
  "tertiary_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the tertiary category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tertiary category */,
  "parent_tertiary_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent tertiary category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tertiary category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tertiary category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tertiary category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tertiary_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger alerts */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the product */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is approved for display */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been flagged for moderation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the promotion is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "code" TEXT /* Coupon code */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date the coupon becomes valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date the coupon expires */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the coupon can be used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the coupon is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the coupon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the coupon was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_coupons" (
  "order_coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order coupon */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order coupon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order coupon was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_coupon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_coupons_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_coupons_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id")
)
